headline: McDonald's Turns To Specialty Drinks And Ends Self Serve Sodas
summary: McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) is rolling out six new specialty beverages across all U.S. locations starting May 6. The lineup includes three fruit focused Refreshers and three crafted sodas, paired with a limited edition designer drink carrier. The company plans to phase out self serve soda machines in U.S. restaurants by 2032, shifting drink preparation behind the counter. For a company built around burgers, fries and core beverages, this move signals a stronger push into higher variety drink...

headline: A Look At McDonald's (MCD) Valuation As New Specialty Drinks And Restaurant Changes Gain Attention
summary: McDonald's (MCD) has put beverages in the spotlight by rolling out six specialty drinks across U.S. restaurants on May 6, while also planning to phase out self serve soda machines nationwide by 2032. See our latest analysis for McDonald's. Despite the buzz around new beverages and restaurant upgrades, McDonald's share price has softened recently, with a 30 day share price return of 7.5% and a 90 day share price return of 11.07%, while the 5 year total shareholder return of 34.23% reflects a...
